_provenance.kernel: DE441 (Horizons default) — independent of the DE440s under test
_provenance.query: EPHEM_TYPE=OBSERVER, CENTER=500@399 (geocentric), QUANTITIES=31,20, REF_SYSTEM=J2000, ANG_FORMAT=DEG — ObsEcLon/ObsEcLat are apparent longitude/latitude in the true ecliptic and equinox of date
_provenance.targets: Barycentre NAIF IDs, mirroring Body::naif_id() and DE440s segments
_provenance.time_scale: UT (Horizons JDUT), matching apparent_position's jd_ut argument
